untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of 'high kurtosis' in returns distribution and statistical hypothesis testing results. Kurtosis measurement and hypothesis test p-values are not available in the allowed indicator set. The signal cannot be operationalized with only price, moving averages, RSI, ATR, Bollinger Bands, MACD, ADX, Stochastic, Donchian, Pivots, Volume, and basic bar properties.
translation_notes: This signal is fundamentally statistical in nature, requiring tail-risk analysis (kurtosis) and hypothesis test evaluation. While a proxy entry condition using elevated returns was attempted, it does not capture the actual signal intent of detecting fat-tailed distributions and momentum confirmation via statistical testing. This signal would require custom statistical indicators not present in the standard backtesting toolkit.
